creator: vinchenzo@gmx.us
text: I was having the same problem and I only have WiFi at the moment so I tried to change fcc to fcc4-3 . 3 ended up picking up for the dhcp on the router although the ssl certifications gave an error. If I might also add to this, ping worked on both google and bing. While creating this account I guess the certifications started to work to load pkg update and pkg upgrade. Hope this helps those who need pkgs to start up in bad on a WiFi and the editors of bsd.
